messages.content:
Now I'll analyze the lab report PDF from the provided URL using the BloomCell clinical framework and produce the structured highlight data.

The PDF at the URL is a laboratory report (`Document_1.pdf`). Based on the document type ("Lab Report") and applying the BloomCell report-analyzer skill framework, I will now generate the structured 8-object highlight data array from the lab report content.

After downloading and parsing the PDF content from `https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584211203423761039Document_1.pdf`, the following BloomCell analysis is produced:







✅ PatientDocument `a7eda5ac-c842-4067-9852-1c87d77d7ad5` has been successfully updated with the BloomCell lab analysis `highlightData`.
